name: source_breaking_return_type_change

name: source_type_alias_change_ripples_to_dependent

description: Real .mjs source: a plain ESM helper's signature gains a parameter; a dependent module (declared as a 1-hop dependency) is flagged.

name: source_namespace_import_dependency_changed
description: Real TS source: validate's contract breaks; login imports the auth module via `import * as token from "./token"` and calls token.validate (plan 003 namespace-import edges), declared here as a 1-hop dependency.

name: source_rename_keeps_old_symbol_id
description: Real TS source: an unambiguous same-shape rename (area -> computeArea) emits a 'renamed' change keyed by the OLD symbol id (plan 012); checking the old id still surfaces same_symbol_unpushed.

name: source_reexported_symbol_changed
description: Real TS source: compute's signature changes; it is re-exported from core.ts as `run` and called by caller.ts (declared here as a 1-hop dependency).
